name: Wholesome Brownies
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Pkg. semisweet chocolate chips; about 1 cup
recipeInstructions:
1. In the top of a double boiler or in a small heavy saucepan over very low heat, melt the chocolate chips and butter or margarine. Remove the pan from the heat and stir the mixture until it is smooth. Set aside.
2. In a medium bowl, combine oats, wheat germ, dry milk, baking powder, salt, and nuts. Set aside.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat eggs and mix in brown and white sugars and vanilla until the mixture is thick. Stir in melted chocolate mixture. Fold in oats mixture until just blended. Pour batter into a greased 8-inch square baking pan.
4. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 20 to 25 minutes or until top is crisp but a toothpick inserted into center comes out slightly moist. Set aside on a rack to cool completely before cutting into strips.
